name: Herb Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, mix together water, egg beaters, applesauce, salt, sugar, oregano, thyme, pepper, parsley, celery seed, and sage.
3. Add wheat germ, oats, bread flour, nonfat dried milk, and yeast to the wet ingredients. Stir until well combined.
4. Pour batter into a greased loaf pan and bake for 30-35 minutes or until golden brown and crusty.
5. Allow bread to cool in the pan for 10 minutes before removing it from the pan.
